title: santolina maritima
intro: Santolina maritima, also known as the lavender cotton or cotton lavender, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its silvery-gray foliage and small yellow flowers. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and antifungal properties, which can be utilized to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Santolina maritima include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting relaxation due to its calming effects. Santolina maritima can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or dried herb to be used in various herbal preparations, such as tinctures, salves, and creams.
